# Help Scout vs Front 2026: Features, Pricing & Who Wins

## Summary

HappyFox's comparison page (regularly updated for 2026) gives a thorough head-to-head analysis of Help Scout and Front. Help Scout pivoted to contact-based pricing with unlimited users in 2025 -- a significant pricing-model change that makes it highly competitive for growing teams. Front crossed $100M ARR in September 2025 and is moving aggressively on AI.

**Pricing (as of 2026):**

| Plan | Help Scout | Front |
|---|---|---|
| Entry | $50/mo flat (unlimited users, 100 contacts/mo) | $25/user/mo Starter (1 channel, max 10 seats) |
| Mid | $75/mo (unlimited users, 500 contacts/mo) | $65/user/mo Professional (omnichannel, max 50 seats) |
| Pro/Enterprise | $75/mo + HIPAA, SSO | $105/user/mo Enterprise |
| AI | Included (Drafts, Assist, Summarize) | Add-on required at lower tiers |
| Free trial | Available | Available |

**Pricing model difference:** Help Scout charges per contacts helped per month (flat rate, unlimited users). Front charges per seat. This is a dramatic advantage for Help Scout for growing teams: a 10-person team pays $50/mo on Help Scout Standard vs. $250/mo on Front Starter.

**Positioning:**

- **Help Scout:** Email-first, clean UX, simplicity-first, personal touch. Best for SMBs and SaaS teams wanting simple email-first support. G2 ease-of-use score: 9.2/10. Can be live in under an hour.
- **Front:** Collaboration-first, complex cross-team operations. Best for logistics, freight, agency, and account management teams. 160+ integrations. Reached $100M ARR milestone September 2025.

**Feature differences:**

- Collaboration: Front is stronger (internal comments, shared drafts, @mentions, real-time co-authoring). Help Scout covers basics.
- Omnichannel: Front (Professional+) handles email, SMS, social, voice (via Twilio/Dialpad), chat. Help Scout is primarily email + beacon.
- Knowledge base: Help Scout includes Docs with AI Answers ($0.75/resolution); Front's knowledge base is more limited.
- HIPAA compliance: Help Scout Pro only; Front Professional+.
- AI: Help Scout includes Drafts, Assist, Summarize in all paid plans. Front requires add-ons on lower tiers.

**When to choose each:**

- Help Scout: Simple email-first team (up to ~50 agents), documentation-driven self-service, budget-constrained, needs to be live in hours not days.
- Front: Complex cross-team collaboration, high-volume shared email, account management work, logistics/freight/agency sector, willing to configure for depth.

## Key takeaways

- Help Scout's 2025 pivot to contact-based pricing with unlimited users is a game-changer for startup teams -- $50/mo flat beats almost every alternative for teams of 5-20
- Front is overkill for pure customer support at small scale; it shines when support blends with account management and internal collaboration
- Help Scout's AI is included; Front's AI requires add-ons (and costs stack fast)
- Front has a $250/mo minimum at Starter (10-seat requirement at $25/user) -- this is a hidden barrier for sub-10-person teams
- For founder-as-support phase, Help Scout is the pragmatic choice; upgrade path to Front makes sense only if internal collaboration depth becomes critical
